name: Siamraj Public Company Limited
summary: Siamraj Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction of natural gas metering and pipeline transmission systems in Thailand. The company offers flow measuring systems and engineering services from branched natural gas pipeline to the power stations, process industrial plants, and natural gas service stations. It also engages in the design, construction, trading, installation, inspection, repairing, maintenance, and service of natural gas metering systems, such as gas chromatographs, flow metering elements, and flow computers and systems; and inspection, repair, and maintenance service of equipment in gas metering stations. In addition, the company owns, operates, and maintains NGV stations in Bangna; designs, supplies, and installs natural gas quality improvement systems; and develops solar energy and other alternative energy projects. Further, it provides manpower, accounting, financial, and maintenance services; and car park services comprising management of parking building and commercial property rental and related services. Additionally, the company provides industrial pump systems, such as gear pumps, sanitary pumps, screw pumps, vacuum systems, diaphragm pumps, process metering, and process centrifugal pumps; industrial and municipal waste treatment air compressors; and gas turbines and compressors for power plants. The company was formerly known as Siamrajathanee Corporation Company Limited and changed its name to Siamraj Public Company Limited in February 2015. Siamraj Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Samutprakarn, Thailand.
